notes.body: assigned to @rchanila

1 Warning
:warning: You've changed some components or directives, but didn't change corresponding
tests. That's OK as long as you're refactoring existing code. If not, please
consider adding/updating tests.
## 📦 Patch release ([conventional commits](https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-ui/-/blob/main/doc/contributing/commits.md)) This Merge Request will trigger a _patch release_ of GitLab UI, triggered by commit: 59bb6b195ce3c0a447a131d87c475554141eb8dc This will bump the third part of the version number, e.g. `v1.2.3` -> `v1.2.4`. ## Reviewer roulette Changes that require review have been detected! A merge request is normally reviewed by both a reviewer and a maintainer in its primary category and by a maintainer in all other categories. To spread load more evenly across eligible reviewers, Danger has picked a candidate for each review slot. Feel free to [override these selections](https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/engineering/projects/#gitlab-ui) if you think someone else would be better-suited or use the [GitLab Review Workload Dashboard](https://gitlab-org.gitlab.io/gitlab-roulette/?currentProject=gitlab-ui) to find other available reviewers. To read more on how to use the reviewer roulette, please take a look at the [Engineering workflow](https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/engineering/workflow/#basics) and [code review guidelines](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/development/code_review.html). Please consider assigning a reviewer or maintainer who is a [domain expert](https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/engineering/projects/#gitlab-ui) in the area of the merge request. Once you've decided who will review this merge request, mention them as you normally would! Danger does not automatically notify them for you. | Category | Reviewer | Maintainer | | -------- | -------- | ---------- | | ~"frontend" | `@marina.mosti` [![profile link](https://gitlab-org.gitlab.io/gitlab-roulette/status-png/_user.png){width=12}](https://gitlab.com/marina.mosti) ![current availability](https://gitlab-org.gitlab.io/gitlab-roulette/status-png/marina.mosti.png){width=12} (UTC+1, 10 hours behind author) | `@pburdette` [![profile link](https://gitlab-org.gitlab.io/gitlab-roulette/status-png/_user.png){width=12}](https://gitlab.com/pburdette) ![current availability](https://gitlab-org.gitlab.io/gitlab-roulette/status-png/pburdette.png){width=12} (UTC-5, 16 hours behind author) | ## UX Review | Component | Reviewer | | --------- | -------- | | ~"component:input group" | [`@chrismicek`](https://gitlab.com/chrismicek) [`@aregnery`](https://gitlab.com/aregnery) [`@jeldergl`](https://gitlab.com/jeldergl) [`@danmh`](https://gitlab.com/danmh) [`@igloude`](https://gitlab.com/igloude) | If your Merge Request changes one or more components, please have it reviewed by a Product Designer. One should have been suggested above. Otherwise, or if they are not available, feel free to assign to a UX Foundations designer: * [`@chrismicek`](https://gitlab.com/chrismicek) * [`@aregnery`](https://gitlab.com/aregnery) * [`@jeldergl`](https://gitlab.com/jeldergl) * [`@danmh`](https://gitlab.com/danmh) * [`@igloude`](https://gitlab.com/igloude) ## Missing spec changes The following spec files were expected to have changes based on the changes in this Merge Request: * `src/components/base/form/form_input_group/form_input_group.spec.js` Consider adding or updating these to ensure new component/directive behaviors are covered by tests. **If needed, you can retry the [🔁 `danger-review` job](https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-ui/-/jobs/8443123777) that generated this comment.**

@jeldergl can you please do the ~UX review? Thanks!
@rchanila adding ~UX approval based on a review in VoiceOver, NVDA, and JAWS. I think it would be helpful to have @sdejonge review ~frontend from a Foundations perspective too.
Thanks @rchanila! Changes look good! Just a small suggestion for consistent description content in Storybook stories. Marking my approval from a foundations perspective.
Hey @rchanila approving with a NB comment, and pending the integration failures

@sdejonge The integration branch is now fixed, the remaining failures are snapshot related from  another commit I think. 

We can use the [commits](https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab/-/merge_requests/172946/commits) & apply them to the dependency update MR. WDYT?
Thanks @rchanila! LGTM ✅
requested review from @jeldergl

@marina.mosti can you please do the ~frontend review? Thanks!


Update: There are some failures in [integrations branch for gitlab-org/gitlab](https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab/-/merge_requests/172946/pipelines), I'm looking at those.

@rchanila I am seeing some seemingly related failures in my own integration MR at https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab/-/merge_requests/173277, could they be related to these changes? Failures in [this pipeline](https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab/-/pipelines/1556882310) happen in components you changed here :thinking:
Yes @mrincon they seem related. I've pushed my changes to [version bump MR](https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab/-/merge_requests/171760).
requested review from @marina.mosti
changed the description
mentioned in merge request gitlab!172537
requested review from @sdejonge
approved this merge request

**suggestion:** remove explicitly setting `label` and `description` props to instead rely on defaults provided from `generateProps` so that they are consistent with other stories, i.e. `description` provides some context to it's usage:

> form group description (used as help text).

```suggestion:-3+0
WithFormInputGroup.args = generateProps();
```

changed this line in [version 3 of the diff](/gitlab-org/gitlab-ui/-/merge_requests/4831/diffs?diff_id=1185924633&start_sha=00f60c8754944007c4254e2c322eea6781804189#e2d183ae05994718a06a3715cfcd465dc18c9ca8_179_176)
Thanks, updated.

**praise:** great work on the investigation https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-ui/-/issues/3007#note_2215102350 and fix here! This seems to resolve a few a11y issues in the integration branch where `readonly` https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab/-/jobs/8395951309 and `aria-label` https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab/-/jobs/8395951312 are being bound to the parent `<div>` in `GlFormInputGroup`.
more praise: Echoing the above, plus thank you for taking the time to dig into my comment regarding this and finding a fix
approved this merge request

suggestion NB: I like the storybook story solution for this, but I am a little concerned that we are not also adding the `append` `GlInputGroupText` and testing it. If you have the time, can you also do this? I think it'll give us peace of mind to know that they are both correctly read for the user

I've tried to focus on fixing the description here. 

I did not add the append variant since we know there is a :bug:. Since this needs some more [investigation](https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab/-/merge_requests/172537#note_2212522208), maybe I can open a new issue for the append text not being announced?

Thoughts? @marina.mosti
Sounds good to me @rchanila thank you
@jeldergl @marina.mosti I've created https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-ui/-/issues/3015+
